$comment_1: Halvren Index — hand-curated monthly index values for the hypothetical equal-weighted basket.
$comment_2: Inception value 100 at Jan 2024. Methodology and the rationale for hand-curation (no live price feed yet) live in docs/DECISIONS.md.
$comment_3: Halvren Index series approximates the equal-weighted month-end total return of the top-10 constituents at each rebalance date, with constituents reset quarterly. Derived from public month-end closes for the names that were in the top 10 at the time of each rebalance, plus dividends paid; reconciled to the principal's read of the through-cycle path. Refresh quarterly with the next desk review.
$comment_4: Benchmark: TSX Composite Total Return (S&P/TSX Composite TR), normalized to 100 at Jan 2024.
